things.name: Bijagos Archipelago UNESCO Reserve
things.description: UNESCO Biosphere Reserve of 88 islands with the last pristine West African coastal ecosystem

things.name: Fortaleza d'Amura (Portuguese Fort)
things.description: 18th-century Portuguese fort in the centre of Bissau

things.name: Bissau Old Town (Bissau Velho)
things.description: Portuguese colonial quarter with a spectacular ruined presidential palace

things.name: Central Market (Mercado de Bandim)
things.description: Vibrant market with kola nuts, cashews and traditional Mandinga and Balanta crafts

things.name: Parque Nacional das Lagoas de Cufada
things.description: West Africa's most important hippo habitat in pristine coastal lagoons

things.name: Rubane Island (Bijagos)
things.description: Ferry to the most beautiful of the Bijagos Islands with sea turtles and manatees

things.name: Cacheu Fort (Cacheu Town)
things.description: 15th-century Portuguese fort in the oldest European town on mainland West Africa

things.name: Bafata Town Day Trip
things.description: Interior market town with Fula and Mandinga culture

things.name: Pelican Island Bird Sanctuary
things.description: Bird Island in Bijagos with pelicans, flamingos and rare coastal birds

things.name: Caldo de Mancarra (Groundnut Soup)
things.description: Guinea-Bissau's signature dish - rich groundnut and palm oil soup with chicken or fish
